case_title: SIU, KEN vs. CROCKETT, RICHARD G. et al

docket_entries.description: CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/DEAN HEDANI AS COUNSEL. DEFS. PRENENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. WITH JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 1765 GRENWICH ST. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 2-15-94, MIDNIGHT - $4,569 RENT & DAMAGES - PL. TO PAY DEFS. $2,000 AT OFFICE OF ATTY. RICHARD STOTT BY 12-31-93 - IF DEFS. MOVE OUT BEFORE 2-15-94 PL. WILL WAIVE RENT & DAMAGES PL. TO RETAIN SECURITY DEPOSIT & ACCRUED INTEREST - PL. TO REPAIR PORCH WINDOWS - PL. WILL S/A JUDGMENT & DISM IF DEFS. MOVE BY 2-15-94 - ANY COMMUNICATION IS TO BE THROUGH MR. HEDANI'S OFFICE - DEFS. WARRANT THERE ARE NO OTHER OCCUPANTS 24 HRS WRITTEN NOTICE TO BE GIVEN DEFS. FOR ANY REPAIRS ON PREMISES - DEFS. TO LEAVE PREMISES IN CLEAN CONDITION - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. PL. ATTY TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIU, KEN AS TO DEFENDANT CROCKETT, RICHARD G. DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER AND ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIU, KEN
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CROCKETT, RICHARD G.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIU, KEN SERVED NOV-07-1993, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT CROCKETT, RICHARD G.
